channel.title: Posts on MeeSumee's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on MeeSumee's Website

item.title: Setting Up Hugo
item.description:
Introduction Link to heading

I malded and found out $8/yr is pocket change for a domain, so I bought it. Then decided to wait 10 days before doing anything cause of PURE laziness.

Here we are, my first post on greenery.cc with the help of hugo.

Like on my github, I can use markdown text to create this post. Pretty cool innit?

Wait until my next post whenever for whatever else I feel like doing.
